questions.scenario: A cleanup script can permanently delete production receipt objects with a broad role. What is the safe-deletion concern?

options.text: One script or typo can remove important data before recovery is possible.
Receipts cannot live in Cloud Storage.
Deletion should be impossible for every data type forever.

questions.explanation: Safe deletion uses permissions, delays, retention, and logging to reduce irreversible mistakes.

questions.scenario: The business has a legal requirement to delete some customer data after a period. What is the healthy goal?

options.text: Make deletion deliberate and policy-driven, not accidental.
Never delete anything under any circumstances.
Let any developer delete all production data.

questions.explanation: Safe deletion does not mean no deletion; it means controlled deletion.

questions.scenario: Which controls can support safe deletion?

options.text: Retention or soft-delete windows where appropriate.
Deletion logging and approval for sensitive data.
Broad delete access for every automation.

questions.explanation: Safe deletion is a set of controls around destructive actions.
